strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at current role
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is from older robotics projects
Cloud platform experience narrow — AWS mentioned, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well beyond the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React work and current hands-on experience building AI-agent and MCP tooling, which maps strongly to the role's internal automation focus. Testing discipline and architecture breadth are clear strengths. Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and limited recent Kotlin/Java or broad cloud/Kubernetes evidence, though the polyglot history suggests quick ramp-up.
